identity.mission: Create a distinct, high-efficiency restaurant management interface that avoids the 'generic SaaS' look. Focus on clarity, speed, and tactile interactions.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss typographic precision with warm, appetizing color palettes.
Emotion First: The UI should feel 'crisp' and 'ready-to-serve'.
Content is King: The food and the orders are the heroes. The UI is the plate.
Zoom In: High legibility for waiters in motion.
Negative Space: Dense information needs breathing room. Use whitespace to separate table statuses.
anti_patterns: Gradients on buttons (forbidden - use solid colors).
Center-aligned text for data tables (use left alignment).
Default Shadcn Card shadows (use custom subtle borders).

headings.usage: Page titles, Table numbers, Bill totals

navigation.mobile_bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-slate-200 h-16 flex items-center justify-around z-50
navigation.desktop_sidebar: w-64 bg-slate-900 text-white h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4

mobile_staff.header: sticky top-0 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100 z-40 p-4
mobile_staff.card_style: flex flex-col items-center justify-center aspect-square rounded-2xl border-2 transition-all active:scale-95

reception_dashboard.table_view: Bento-style grid. Large tables span 2 cols.
reception_dashboard.bill_section: Fixed right panel or drawer for checkout.

universal_guidelines: Use 'DM Sans' for all headings. Import it in index.css.
Do NOT use gradients for buttons. Solid colors only.
Ensure 44px min touch target size for mobile buttons.
Use 'sonner' for all notifications (order added, error, etc).
Table cards must show status clearly with color coding (Green/White/Red).
Kitchen print view should be a simple modal with monospace font.
All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes.
Do NOT center align the app container. Use full width.
